case_title: CHINEDU EKUMA VS. SIMPLILEARN AMERICAS, INC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF EKUMA, CHINEDU
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED AUG-11-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPLILEARN AMERICAS, INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,100.00 FILED BY EKUMA, CHINEDU AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPLILEARN AMERICAS, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(PLANTIFF)**GRANTED**

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CHINEDU EKUMA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT SIMPLILEARN AMERICAS, INC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF STATED IN COURT THAT REFUND HAS BEEN RECEIVED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF EKUMA, CHINEDU
